title: August 7
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}

'''August 7''' is the 219th day of the year (220th in leap years). There are 146 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1930s#1937|1937]] – [[Merwin Goldsmith]] is born.
*[[1940s#1945|1945]] – [[Graeme Blundell]] is born.
*[[1950s#1957|1957]] – [[Paul Dini]] is born.
*[[1960s#1960|1960]] – [[Andy Craven]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Nishan Hindes|Nishan]] and [[Nifa Hindes]] are born.
*[[1980]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 128|''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly'' 128]] published.
*[[1986]] – [[Jordan Maison]] is born.
*[[1996]] – [[Shadows of the Empire 4|''Shadows of the Empire'' 4]] published.
*[[2001]] – [[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide (real-life book)|''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide'']] published.
*2001 – [[Star Wars Insider 55|''Star Wars Insider'' 55]] published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]]'' published.
*2002 – [[Star Wars (1998) 44|''Star Wars'' (1998) 44]] published.
*2002 – [[Star Wars: Republic: Darkness (TPB)|''Star Wars Republic: Darkness'' trade paperback]] published.
*2002 – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 32|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 32]] published.
*[[2004]] – [[Wookieepedia|Star Wars Wiki]] concept begins to form on [[Wikipedia:Wikipedia|Wikipedia]].
*[[2008]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Press Out 'n' Build]]'' published in the UK.
*2008 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Front Row Seat Storybook]]'' published in the UK.
*[[2012]] – ''[[X-Wing: Mercy Kill]]'' published.
*[[2017]] – "[[The Lost Crystals of Qalydon]]" premieres on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2018]] – ''[[Star Wars Vol. 8: Mutiny at Mon Cala]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 70|''Star Wars'' (2015) 70]] published.
*[[2020]] – [[Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge – Adventure Awaits|''Star Wars'': Galaxy's Edge – ''Adventure Awaits'']] added to [[Disney+]].
*[[2024]] – [[Inquisitors 2|''Inquisitors'' 2]] published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic (2023) 10|''The High Republic'' (2023) 10]] published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2023) 8|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2023) 8]] published.
